aas:langStringTextType.aas:text: defaultAdminShell

Array of good records to be reported. Each good record represents one declared good instance identified by CN Code and business transaction details and contains the CBAM-related information for that declared good.

Array of good records to be reported. Each good record represents one declared good instance identified by CN Code and business transaction details and contains the CBAM-related information for that declared good.

One or multiple objects containing attributes that describe an operator each that legally owns the installations producing the CBAM good that is subject of this request. Operator can be different to supplier. One supplier (business partner of this transaction) can source the good defined in the business transaction from other suppliers. This can result in multiple operators (mutliple operator objects) involved in the depicted supply chain.

One or multiple objects containing attributes that describe an operator each that legally owns the installations producing the CBAM good that is subject of this request. Operator can be different to supplier. One supplier (business partner of this transaction) can source the good defined in the business transaction from other suppliers. This can result in multiple operators (mutliple operator objects) involved in the depicted supply chain.

Pointer to a reference document previously provided in businessTransactionDetails, optionally refined to a specific part/item of that document, to indicate which document (and which part of it) the operator-related response data corresponds to.

Additional locator/metadata to identify a specific element within the referenced document (e.g., line item, position number, material code, annex section). Used when the document covers multiple goods/operators and you need to specify which part applies.

Additional locator/metadata to identify a specific element within the referenced document (e.g., line item, position number, material code, annex section). Used when the document covers multiple goods/operators and you need to specify which part applies.
Object containing attributes to identify the operator.
Unique set of identifiers for the operator. BPNL and Operator CBAM ID are listed as separate attributes.
Object containing attributes that document the address of the installation.

One or more objects describing each installation producing the CBAM good that is the subject of this request. A single operator may own multiple installations supplying the CBAM good in this request; in that case, multiple installation objects are provided. Each installation may include multiple production methods.

One or more objects describing each installation producing the CBAM good that is the subject of this request. A single operator may own multiple installations supplying the CBAM good in this request; in that case, multiple installation objects are provided. Each installation may include multiple production methods.
Object containing attributes to identify the installation.
Unique set of identifiers of the installation.

aas:langStringNameType.aas:text: United Nations Code for Trade and Transport Locations

aas:langStringTextType.aas:text: One or more objects detailing the specific production method(s) that the emission objects refer to; each installation may include multiple production methods.
One or more objects detailing the specific production method(s) that the emission objects refer to; each installation may include multiple production methods.
An object describing the temporal reference and the mass flow attributable to the specified production method within an installation.
Object detailing the direct embedded emissions referenced to the specific production method and installation.
Object deailing the indirect embedded emissions referenced to the specific production method and installation.

aas:langStringNameType.aas:text: emission factor tonnes CO2 per Mwh
electricity consumed Mwh per tonnes good

aas:langStringTextType.aas:text: One or multiple objects describing the carbon price due in a third country per emission object on installation level.
One or multiple objects describing the carbon price due in a third country per emission object on installation level.
Identifier of the independent person issuing a payment statement about the carbon price paid by the direct supplier or any other tier-n supplier in the value chain.
Identifier of the independent person issuing a payment statement about the carbon price paid by the direct supplier or any other tier-n supplier in the value chain.

aas:langStringNameType.aas:text: description and indication of legal act

aas:langStringTextType.aas:text: Object describing the specific business transaction between the customer (e.g. importer) and the supplier, so the request can be mapped to a real transaction.
List of reference documents used to identify the transaction (e.g., invoice, purchase order, customs declaration, shipment); each entry provides a document type and identifier value.
List of reference documents used to identify the transaction (e.g., invoice, purchase order, customs declaration, shipment); each entry provides a document type and identifier value.
Object with attributes describing the identifiers of the two business exchanging this dataset, namely the requesting and the responding company.
Object containing one or multiple identifiers of the responding company.
Object containing one or multiple identifiers of the responding company.
Object containing one or multiple pairs of identifier type and value of the requesting company.
Object containing one or multiple pairs of identifier type and value of the requesting company.

aas:langStringDefinitionTypeIec61360.aas:text: Additional locator/metadata to identify a specific element within the referenced document (e.g., line item, position number, material code, annex section). Used when the document covers multiple goods/operators and you need to specify which part applies.
Identifier of the referenced document; must match the corresponding reference document value from the request.
Type of the referenced document; must match a reference document type from the business transaction details object in the request.

Pointer to a reference document previously provided in businessTransactionDetails, optionally refined to a specific part/item of that document, to indicate which document (and which part of it) the operator-related response data corresponds to.
Boolean property indicating whether the supplier (i.e., the business transaction partner) is also the installation operator.
BPNL (business partner number legal) of operator, if company is registered at Catena-X.
Unique identifier for the operator in the official EU O3CI portal (operator of third country installation).
Unique set of identifiers for the operator. BPNL and Operator CBAM ID are listed as separate attributes.
Name of the operator
The email address of the person that is assigned in the contact details of the operator.
The city where the operator is located.
The street where the operator is located.
Object containing attributes that document the address of the installation.
Object containing attributes to identify the operator.
Unique identifier for the installation in the official EU O3CI portal (operator of third country installation).
Name of the installation.
The longitude where the installation is located.
The latitude where the installation is located.
The type of coordinates: 01 GPS, 02 GNSS.
The plot or parcel number of the location.

aas:langStringNameType.aas:text: United Nations Code for Trade and Transport Locations

aas:langStringPreferredNameTypeIec61360.aas:text: United Nations Code for Trade and Transport Locations

aas:langStringDefinitionTypeIec61360.aas:text: The United Nations Code for Trade and Transport Locations (UN/LOCODE) as defined by UNECE list.
Unique set of identifiers of the installation.
Object containing attributes to identify the installation.
Specific identifier of the production method according the official value list provided by the CBAM declarant portal.
Specific identifier of the steel mill used for the production of the good, if applicable.
Any additional information that the supplier wants to provide with regard to the production method.
An object describing the temporal reference and the mass flow attributable to the specified production method within an installation.
Any additional information that the supplier wants to provide with regard to direct embedded emissions.
Object deailing the indirect embedded emissions referenced to the specific production method and installation.
Object detailing the direct embedded emissions referenced to the specific production method and installation.
Declaration of applied literature or published information by the statistics office, according to following allowed values: 01 Other, 02 Commission based on IEA data.

aas:langStringNameType.aas:text: emission factor tonnes CO2 per Mwh

aas:langStringPreferredNameTypeIec61360.aas:text: emission factor tonnes CO2 per Mwh

aas:langStringDefinitionTypeIec61360.aas:text: This element declares the applied emission factor for electricity, expressed as tonnes CO2 per MWh.
Any additional information detailing the source of the emissions value.
Value of the indirect embedded emissions, expressed in tonnes of CO₂ equivalents per tonne of product, calculated with reference to the specific production method and installation.

aas:langStringNameType.aas:text: electricity consumed Mwh per tonnes good

aas:langStringPreferredNameTypeIec61360.aas:text: electricity consumed Mwh per tonnes good

aas:langStringDefinitionTypeIec61360.aas:text: Value of the consumed electricity, expressed as MWh per tonne of good.

Describes the source of the electricity according to the official value list: SOE01 Direct technical link to electricity generator, SOE02 (Bilateral) power purchase agreement, SOE03 Received from the grid.
Object deailing the indirect embedded emissions referenced to the specific production method and installation.
The free allocation factor, expressed as tonnes of CO2​ equivalents per tonne of product, based on the specific material and energy inputs used to produce the product.

Attribute describing the form of carbon price, also referred to as type of instrument. The values are defined as: 01 Carbon tax, 02 Carbon levy, 03 Carbon fee, 04 National Emissions Trading System, 05 Regional Emissions Trading System, 06 Other.
Identifier of the independent person issuing a payment statement about the carbon price paid by the direct supplier or any other tier-n supplier in the value chain.

aas:langStringNameType.aas:text: description and indication of legal act

aas:langStringPreferredNameTypeIec61360.aas:text: description and indication of legal act

aas:langStringDefinitionTypeIec61360.aas:text: Reference the description of the underlying legal act according to which the carbon price was paid.
Monetary value of the paid carbon price.
currency code according to ISO 4217.
One or multiple objects describing the carbon price due in a third country per emission object on installation level.
One or more objects detailing the specific production method(s) that the emission objects refer to; each installation may include multiple production methods.

One or more objects describing each installation producing the CBAM good that is the subject of this request. A single operator may own multiple installations supplying the CBAM good in this request; in that case, multiple installation objects are provided. Each installation may include multiple production methods.

One or multiple objects containing attributes that describe an operator each that legally owns the installations producing the CBAM good that is subject of this request. Operator can be different to supplier. One supplier (business partner of this transaction) can source the good defined in the business transaction from other suppliers. This can result in multiple operators (mutliple operator objects) involved in the depicted supply chain.
List of reference documents used to identify the transaction (e.g., invoice, purchase order, customs declaration, shipment); each entry provides a document type and identifier value.
Object describing the specific business transaction between the customer (e.g. importer) and the supplier, so the request can be mapped to a real transaction.
Free text describing the product and any characteristics that help identify the right business transaction per request.
This is the 8-digit CN code (combined nomenclature) of the reported good, refering to official CBAM value list to ensure updated content.

Array of good records to be reported. Each good record represents one declared good instance identified by CN Code and business transaction details and contains the CBAM-related information for that declared good.
Object containing one or multiple identifiers of the responding company.
Object containing one or multiple pairs of identifier type and value of the requesting company.
Object with attributes describing the identifiers of the two business exchanging this dataset, namely the requesting and the responding company.

List of element identifiers that define the scope of objects and/or data attributes requested for inclusion in the supplier response. The identifiers refer to sections and attributes defined in the corresponding request type schemes, and indicate which parts of the data model are expected to be provided in the response (subject to the rules of the respective response schema, e.g., mandatory fields and conditional dependencies).
